title: Makefile tweaks to fix make shell
body:
Also, bump the Dockerfile to use the latest Golang image, as most of our testing is now done on 1.11

Fixes: #1999

comments.body: (I'm not really sure what the tmpfs was doing there in the first place, but I think we can safely just remove it...)

[APPROVALNOTIFIER] This PR is **APPROVED** This pull-request has been approved by: *mheon* The full list of commands accepted by this bot can be found [here](https://go.k8s.io/bot-commands). The pull request process is described [here](https://git.k8s.io/community/contributors/guide/owners.md#the-code-review-process)
Needs approval from an approver in each of these files: - ~~[OWNERS](https://github.com/containers/libpod/blob/master/OWNERS)~~ [mheon] Approvers can indicate their approval by writing `/approve` in a comment Approvers can cancel approval by writing `/approve cancel` in a comment

LGTM, although I'm still not able to run ginkgo tests on the resulting containter....
```
go test -v test/e2e/libpod_suite_test.go test/e2e/images_test.go
# command-line-arguments [command-line-arguments.test]
test/e2e/libpod_suite_test.go:30:32: undefined: ALPINE
test/e2e/libpod_suite_test.go:30:40: undefined: BB
test/e2e/libpod_suite_test.go:59:3: undefined: CACHE_IMAGES
test/e2e/libpod_suite_test.go:78:24: undefined: CACHE_IMAGES
test/e2e/libpod_suite_test.go:118:20: undefined: STORAGE_OPTIONS
test/e2e/libpod_suite_test.go:347:40: undefined: ALPINE
test/e2e/libpod_suite_test.go:356:40: undefined: ALPINE
test/e2e/libpod_suite_test.go:367:40: undefined: ALPINE
test/e2e/libpod_suite_test.go:378:40: undefined: ALPINE
test/e2e/images_test.go:48:48: undefined: ALPINE
test/e2e/images_test.go:48:48: too many errors
FAIL	command-line-arguments [build failed]
```
@baude I think this is a result of the multiarch work - can we set whatever's necessary automatically here?
@TomSweeneyRedHat add test/e2e/images_test.go test/e2e/config.go test/e2e/config_amd64.go to your command
@baude, that works like a charm.  I'll update the README.md with my submit.  Thanks!
